sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35079" key="e)nafrodisia/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐναφροδῑσιάζω</orth>, <sense id="n35079.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">venerem exerceo in</tr_>. ., <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κόρῃ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:1:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.15</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:2:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
